prompt:
Using the attached design reference, produce a CLEAN BACKGROUND ART PLATE version of the exact same scene.

REMOVE every UX element:
- the 'PERSEID ECHO CREATIONS' wordmark at the top-left
- the nav items 'APPROACH SERVICES ABOUT CONTACT' at the top-right
- the entire stacked headline 'Built. Not pitched. Not promised.'
- the persimmon orange underline beneath the headline
- the meta line 'AN AI SOLUTIONS PRACTICE / EST. 2026'
- the ghost 'Start a Conversation' button at the lower-right
- the bottom-left index marker 'INDEX / 01 / PRACTICE'
- any other text, button, line, or chrome on the wall, not on the paper

KEEP, EXACTLY AS THEY ARE, every photographic element including all hand-drawn map content:
- the hand and forearm in rolled-cuff white shirt holding a black fountain pen mid-motion
- the hand-drawn operating-system map on cream A3 paper with all its boxes, swimlanes, arrows, and handwritten node labels (INTAKE / TRIAGE / AGENT / REVIEW / OUTPUT or whatever the model wrote)
- the aggressively circled node with 'NO' handwritten next to it
- the crossed-out box with two diagonal pen strokes
- the re-routed arrow arc over the old line
- the dog-eared folded corner at the upper-right of the paper
- the closed matte-black laptop, the ceramic mug of black coffee, the coffee ring stain on the wood, the leather-bound notebooks
- the heavy wooden desk, the deep navy plaster wall behind
- the lighting (chiaroscuro late golden hour from camera-left), camera angle, depth of field, film grain, color grade, aspect ratio, and slight upper-right vignette

The output must look like the empty stage the original UX was sitting on - the photograph taken BEFORE any web text was ever placed over it. The handwritten map on the paper is NOT UX - it is part of the photograph and must stay.

FORBID: any web/UI text anywhere in the image (wordmark, nav, headline, meta, button, index), any logo, any UI overlay, any persimmon orange or chromatic accent, any added object, any added person.
